case_title: OPORTUN INC. VS. SUZET REBECA OLIVAS SANTOS

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-30-2019 - JUDGMENT.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,500.00 FILED BY OPORTUN INC. AS TO DEFENDANT OLIVAS SANTOS, SUZET REBECA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-30-2019 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE: $55.00) SERVED JAN-10-2019, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT OLIVAS SANTOS, SUZET REBECA

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JAN-30-2019 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JAN-30-2019 BY A. JAMES ROBERTSON II. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF OPORTUN, INC. REPRESENTED BY JHONATTAN HERRADA LEGAL COLLECTIONS SPECIALIST. DEFENDANT SUZET REBECA OLIVAS SANTOS DID NOT APPEAR. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN; NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT OLIVAS SANTOS, SUZET REBECA $2,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $105.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,605.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
